endpoints.name: List available operations
endpoints.description: List the available operations supported by the Microsoft.EventGrid resource provider
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: List topic types
endpoints.description: List all registered topic types
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Get a topic type
endpoints.description: Get information about a topic type
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{TOPICTYPENAME}} with a real topictypename.

endpoints.name: List event types
endpoints.description: List event types for a topic type
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{TOPICTYPENAME}} with a real topictypename.

endpoints.name: Get an aggregated list of all global event subscriptions under an Azure subscription
endpoints.description: List all aggregated global event subscriptions under a specific Azure subscription
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: List all regional event subscriptions under an Azure subscription
endpoints.description: List all event subscriptions from the given location under a specific Azure subscription
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location.

endpoints.name: List all regional event subscriptions under an Azure subscription for a topic type
endpoints.description: List all event subscriptions from the given location under a specific Azure subscription and topic type.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{TOPICTYPENAME}} with a real topictypename. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location.

endpoints.name: List all global event subscriptions for a topic type
endpoints.description: List all global event subscriptions under an Azure subscription for a topic type.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{TOPICTYPENAME}} with a real topictypename.

endpoints.name: List topics under an Azure subscription
endpoints.description: List all the topics under an Azure subscription
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: List all global event subscriptions under an Azure subscription and resource group
endpoints.description: List all global event subscriptions under a specific Azure subscription and resource group
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: List all regional event subscriptions under an Azure subscription and resource group
endpoints.description: List all event subscriptions from the given location under a specific Azure subscription and resource group
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: List all regional event subscriptions under an Azure subscription and resource group for a topic type
endpoints.description: List all event subscriptions from the given location under a specific Azure subscription and resource group and topic type
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{TOPICTYPENAME}} with a real topictypename. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: List all global event subscriptions under a resource group for a topic type
endpoints.description: List all global event subscriptions under a resource group for a specific topic type.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{TOPICTYPENAME}} with a real topictypename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: List topics under a resource group
endpoints.description: List all the topics under a resource group
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: Get a topic
endpoints.description: Get properties of a topic
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{TOPICNAME}} with a real topicname.

endpoints.name: Create a topic
endpoints.description: Asynchronously creates a new topic with the specified parameters.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{TOPICNAME}} with a real topicname.

endpoints.name: Delete a topic
endpoints.description: Delete existing topic
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{TOPICNAME}} with a real topicname.

endpoints.name: Update a topic
endpoints.description: Asynchronously updates a topic with the specified parameters.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{TOPICNAME}} with a real topicname.

endpoints.name: List keys for a topic
endpoints.description: List the two keys used to publish to a topic
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{TOPICNAME}} with a real topicname.

endpoints.name: Regenerate key for a topic
endpoints.description: Regenerate a shared access key for a topic
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{TOPICNAME}} with a real topicname.

endpoints.name: List all event subscriptions for a specific topic
endpoints.description: List all event subscriptions that have been created for a specific topic
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{PROVIDERNAMESPACE}} with a real providernamespace. Replace {{RESOURCENAME}} with a real resourcename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{RESOURCETYPENAME}} with a real resourcetypename.

endpoints.name: List topic event types
endpoints.description: List event types for a topic
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{PROVIDERNAMESPACE}} with a real providernamespace. Replace {{RESOURCENAME}} with a real resourcename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{RESOURCETYPENAME}} with a real resourcetypename.

endpoints.name: Get an event subscription
endpoints.description: Get properties of an event subscription
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SCOPE}} with a real scope. Replace {{EVENTSUBSCRIPTIONNAME}} with a real eventsubscriptionname.

endpoints.name: Create an event subscription
endpoints.description: Asynchronously creates a new event subscription to the specified scope. Existing event subscriptions cannot be updated with this API and should instead use the Update event subscription API.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SCOPE}} with a real scope. Replace {{EVENTSUBSCRIPTIONNAME}} with a real eventsubscriptionname.

endpoints.name: Delete an event subscription
endpoints.description: Delete an existing event subscription
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SCOPE}} with a real scope. Replace {{EVENTSUBSCRIPTIONNAME}} with a real eventsubscriptionname.

endpoints.name: Update an event subscription
endpoints.description: Asynchronously updates an existing event subscription.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SCOPE}} with a real scope. Replace {{EVENTSUBSCRIPTIONNAME}} with a real eventsubscriptionname.

endpoints.name: Get full URL of an event subscription
endpoints.description: Get the full endpoint URL for an event subscription
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SCOPE}} with a real scope. Replace {{EVENTSUBSCRIPTIONNAME}} with a real eventsubscriptionname.
